ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the model is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "balanced_accuracy" REAL /* Balanced accuracy of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "cohen_cappa" REAL /* Cohen's kappa of the model */,
  "cappa_m" REAL /* Cappa m of the model */,
  "matthews_corrcoef" REAL /* Matthews correlation coefficient of the model */,
  "harmonic_mean" REAL /* Harmonic mean of the model */,
  "fbeta_score" REAL /* F-beta score of the model */,
  "auc" REAL /* AUC of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metrics were recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the recorder */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were evaluated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the metrics belong to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, share) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the version is the current one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the audit event belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the audit event belongs to */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the metric */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the metric */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being shared */,
  "shared_with" INTEGER /* ID of the user the model is being shared with */,
  "shared_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was shared */,
  "shared_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who shared the model */,
  "shared_type" TEXT /* Type of sharing (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the sharing is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_shared_by FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_shared_with FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the permission was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the permission is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role is assigned to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the visualization was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the visualization is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the visualization */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_access_visualization_id FOREIGN KEY ("visualization_id") REFERENCES visualizations ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
